title: FAS-1 Alias Registration Request
description: Request body for POST /v1/aliases — registers a new pay: alias in the DNS of Money registry.

alias_name.description: The pay: URI to register. Must follow FAS-1 format: pay:{name} or pay:{namespace}.{identifier}. Lowercase only, dots are hierarchy separators.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown during resolution (e.g., 'Alpha Vendors LLC').

preferred_rail.description: The preferred payment rail for this alias. Determines which endpoint is returned as the top-priority option.

routing_number.description: 9-digit ABA routing number. Required for ACH and FedNow rails.

account_number.description: Bank account number. Required for ACH and FedNow rails.

xrpl_address.description: XRPL r-address. Required for XRPL rail. Also required for founding tier registration as the registrant wallet.

wallet_address.description: Generic blockchain wallet address. Used for non-XRPL crypto rails (e.g., Solana).

destination_tag.description: XRPL destination tag. Optional, used when multiple users share one XRPL address.
